entry.title: JSON model loading after the view is rendered, thus leaving the view blank
entry.content: I am facing a problem in sapui5 where my view is loading before the model maintained in the manifest.json is pulling data from the given json file and because of this the view is rendering blank. I have to refresh the page manually for view to wait for model to load before the view is rendered. I have used attachRequestCompleted function on the model to get model data but sometimes while navigating from one view to another I am facing this issue. I have also maintained preload: true for model in manifest. I can see the json file loading in the network tab. How can I solve this issue, does anyone have any idea?

entry.title: Can not deploy Fiori project to BTP ABAP environment .
entry.content:
Hi, SAP UI5 Expert, I create a fiori element project in BAS and everything are ok. The sap ui5 version is 1.120.12 . When I deploy it into BTP ABAP environment. Error shows as the following: ✔ Start deployment (Y/n)? … yes info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Creating archive with UI5 build result. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Archive created. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Starting to deploy. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 ZFREIGHTORDER2 found on target system: true info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 SAPUI5 application ZFREIGHTORDER2 was uploaded or registered with warnings info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 ***** Upload of SAPUI5 App or Library from ZIP-Archive into SAPUI5 ABAP Repository ***** info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Running in regular mode, brief log info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 15 Files found in Archive. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 * Parameters * info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 A BAdI implementation for /UI5/BADI_REPOSITORY_LOAD is active: Operation parameters may have been adjusted. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The name of the SAPUI5 repository "ZFREIGHTORDER2" has been determined from the corresponding import parameter. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The binary files are identified using the standard settings. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The text files are identified using the standard settings. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The files and folders to be ignored are determined from the built-in standard settings. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The description of the SAPUI5 repository has been determined from the corresponding import parameter. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Transport Request "H02K900024" has been determined from the corresponding import parameter. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The external Code Page Name "UTF8" has been determined from the corresponding import parameter. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The acceptance of Unix style end of line markers in text files has been determined from the corresponding import parameter. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Unix style end of line markers in text files get accepted. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The delta mode has been turned on. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Running in safe mode info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Updating existing SAPUI5 ABAP repository ZFREIGHTORDER2 info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 * Updating the Application Index * info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Messages from its application log: info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Writing descriptor apps/freightordermgt2/app/sap/zfreightorder2/ info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Updated UIADs for UI5 Repository ZFREIGHTORDER2, package ZFREIGHT_ORDER_EVENT_PACKAGE, transport H02K900024 warn abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 App descriptor of type 'application' does not define a launchable inbound warn abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 No UIAD was created as no inbound is defined in manifest.json info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 For details see the application log (SLG1) in client 000 for object /UI5/APPIDX . info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 A BAdI implementation for /UI5/BADI_REPOSITORY_LOAD is active: Final activities may have been performed. warn abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 SAPUI5 application ZFREIGHTORDER2 was uploaded or registered with warnings info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 * Done * info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 App available at https://ad7f109a-dfc3-490b-9539-669f3cbf0578.abap-web.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/zfreightorder2 info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Deployment Successful. node:internal/modules/esm/resolve:265 throw new ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND( ^ Error [ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND]: Cannot find module '/home/user/projects/freightordermgt2/node_modules/glob/dist/esm/index.js' imported from /home/user/projects/freightordermgt2/node_modules/rimraf/dist/esm/index.js at finalizeResolution (node:internal/modules/esm/resolve:265:11) at moduleResolve (node:internal/modules/esm/resolve:933:10) at defaultResolve (node:internal/modules/esm/resolve:1157:11) at ModuleLoader.defaultResolve (node:internal/modules/esm/loader:390:12) at ModuleLoader.resolve (node:internal/modules/esm/loader:359:25) at ModuleLoader.getModuleJob (node:internal/modules/esm/loader:234:38) at ModuleWrap. (node:internal/modules/esm/module_job:87:39) at link (node:internal/modules/esm/module_job:86:36) { code: 'ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND', url: 'file:///home/user/projects/freightordermgt2/node_modules/glob/dist/esm/index.js' }

I checked the folder home/user/projects/freightordermgt2/node_modules/glob/dist/esm, the index.js not exists, even I copied index.js from another project, the issue is the same .

Would you please let me know how to resolve this issue ?

 

Best regards!

Jacky Liu

entry.title: How to establish trust between two XSUAA protected approuters?
entry.content:
Hello community,

we are trying to nest one SAPUI5 component in another. While this is usually easily done by leveraging the component container control, our target setup seems to be challenging.

Application 1 is served via. a standalone approuter and nests Application 2 which is deployed to the HTML5 Application Repository and is served via the managed approuter. Both applications are XSUAA protected use the same identity provider.

 

The challenge seems to be the authorization part in the nesting process. The request from Application 1 to Application 2 always results in an HTTP 401, no matter the destinations authentication type and configuration.

Application 2 needs to be XSUAA protected to be able to use Principal Propagation to call ERP resources.

Is this setup technically possible? If so, how can we achieve it?

Thank you in advance,
Daniel

entry.title: SAPUI5 Intent based navigation - open target app in popup window
entry.content:
Hi,

I have the requirement to open a popup window from my SAP Fiori element List Report app.

The popup window should show some details for a given key (from List report). The popup window will be used in the future in other Fiori apps as well. Means, the popup window should be somehow reusable.

My idea is to create a separated app (SAPUI5 freestyle) for the details popup. This app will be triggered via intent based navigation and the corresponding target mapping. But, this will call the app inplace or in a new browser tab. 

Is it possible to call the new app in a popup or popover window?

Thanks a lot for your support.

Kind regards

Axel

entry.title: how to show special characters in file name after downloading it to our personal PC using uploadSet
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement to show special characters in file name after downloading it to our laptop.

While uploading a file(uploadSet control has been used), I have given encodeURIComponent(filename) to show special characters. But while downloading it, the special characters are replaced with "#".

Could you please help me here in resolving this issue?

 

Thanks & Regards,

Asha

entry.title: unexpected duplcation of flow type 1101 when creating a TRM contract with BAPI_FTR_IRATE_DEALCREATE
entry.content: We want to create a bulk of TRM contracts thanks the use of BAPI_FTR_IRATE_DEALCREATE.  When trying to adjust the settings of the existing flow type (1101), the system is checking whether gs_mainflow-flow_key= '9XXX2' which is ok for the first contract created.  Therefore the existing flow type (1101) is correctly updated.  Unfortunately when it tries to create the next contract the value is not anymore = '9XXX2'  and therefore it duplicates flow type (1101) which is not the expected behaviour.   Does anybody experienced similar issue ?

entry.title: Combination of FioriElements & UI5 Freestyle in CAP
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a requirement to create a CAP Project with the initial page (List-View) using the Fiori Elements. Then navigating from the List-view record to the Object Page/Detailed page using the UI5 Freestyle. Is this Possible?

We are using the ODATA-V4.

Let me know your feedback or thoughts.

entry.title: Fiori elements analytic page, hide table options
entry.content:
Hi *,

I want to have analytic page, but without charts section, so only visual and regular smart filers and table, so table type here selected should be third icon, then hidden, so user can not toggle between modes.

 

Any help would be useful.

Thanks in an advance.

entry.title: Form display FormElement with icon
entry.content:
Hi I need to display Pop-up on click on the icon.

I'm using Form element's.

<f:FormElement>
                                        <f:fields>
                                        <Text text="{i18n>DestinationSystem}"></Text>
                                        <core:Icon src="sap-icon://question-mark" width="1rem"
                                        app:id="DQ_DestinationSystem" visible="{= !${device>/system/phone}}" class="sapUiTinyMarginTop" press="fnTooltip"/>
                                        <ComboBox id="idEditDQ_DestinationSystemReq"
                                         change="onClickComboSelection"
                                         selectedKey="0"                                          
                                         selectionChange="fnChangeState">

Is it possible to display icon beside label?

entry.title: Field Masking **** in SAP Personas
entry.content:
Hello Experts

We got a requirement to mask an input field. We could achieve it with an invisible property setting to 1 for SAP GUI. But same screen in Personas field disappears.

Any ideas how we can mask **** a input field in SAP Personas?

Regards,

Hari

entry.title: OData v4 ListBinding create(obj).created() doesn't continue on an error
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to implement a controller OData v4 create on a ListBinding as described on the documentation page. Essentials > Data Binding > Models > OData V4 Model > Creating an Entitiy

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/c9723f8265f644af91c0ed941e114d46

When the backend returns an error (in our case because we have a unique constraint on one of the fields, but it can just be mimic-ed by having CAP send a reject('some reason) in the onHandler) the error shows in the developer console logging. However the execution stops on the "created()" Promise. It doesn't go into the .then() or .catch().

I found similar older issues on the links below. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/odata-v4-context-created-how-to-catch-an-error/qaq-p/11957274

https://github.com/SAP/openui5/issues/3760

Any ideas?

entry.title: Navigation to Detail Page does not work using FPM & UI5 Free style
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am using the Flexible Programming Model (FPM) for my application.

Step1:- Created a Fiori Elements List Page using FPM.

Step2:- Created a routing to Detailed Page as shown below, this navigates to the other detailed page.

Step3:- Now, when trying to use the old UI5 Views & Controllers that are created with UI5 Freestyle approach (No FPM components at all for the detailed page).
In the detailed page nothing comes up and throws an error as shown below.

 

Does the above approach really works?

Thanks for the inputs.

entry.title: SAPUI5 ui.table with SmartField on JSONModel
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have an interesting requirement. I want to create a table where my users can add new records. For this I use a sap.ui.table with input fields. This table has a binding with a JSONModel to store the new records. My oData Service has Annotations to generate value helps so I would like to add SmartFields in my table so I can re-use these value helps. So there are 2 options I think:

1. Can I use regular input fields in my sap.ui.table with generated value helps from my annotations? 

2. Can I put SmartFields in my table that uses a JSONModel to "write" my values but uses oData to retrieve valuehelp annotations? 

Thanks!

Best regards,

Axel Dion 

EDIT:
Currently I have the following and this works when I perform .bindValue("helperModel>/newCharacteristics/0/SalesOrganization") manually on each of the fields. This is because the bindings mode is changed to two way binding. Although my models are TwoWay the binding is set on OneWay when only using the XML. Any ideas why this is happening?

entry.title: How to implement Value-Help in Input-Field for RAP OData Fiori/UI5 App?
entry.content:
I am developing a UI5 app that includes a SimpleForm with multiple input fields. Some of these fields require value help (F4 help) that fetches data from SAP tables in the backend.

From my understanding, RAP (RESTful ABAP Programming) is primarily used for displaying lists in the frontend. However, in my case, I have a form with various input fields.

Do I maybe need to create a separate RAP-OData service with an EntitySet for each value Help Field? Or what would be the best practife for implementing value help in this scenario?

Any guidance or examples would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: how to transport an ambient ui5 application
entry.content:
hello to all
I have some beginner doubts.
context:
I created a ui5 application in SAP BAS and did the deploy-to-abap to the ERP DEV environment.
Once the deploy is done, I transport the application to QAS.
My doubts are:
Is it ok what I did?
Is it possible to deploy directly to QAS?
When transporting from environments, what should I include in the transport TO?

Also, I must say that when I do this, the application only works in DEV and not in QAS. When I do a "test service" to the application from the trx SICF in DEV, the application opens correctly. But if I do the same in QAS, the application opens a white screen in the browser and says "file not found".

entry.title: Save draft of review new hire data in onboarding causes screen freeze
entry.content:
Hi,

we have recenly implemented the onboarding 2.0. Module. Roughly the same time as the 1st release 2024 was launched. we now notice that the save draft functionality in the Review New Hire Step does not work properly.

 When we try to open this step after saving it as a draft, we get a screen freeze , whereas the save draft did not cause issues during testing. 

It is difficult to determine if this is a configuration issue (role based permission), or a release issue. 

Does anyone encounter the same issue?

Thanks,

Katrien

entry.title: Formatting Date Column in Smart Table Export to Spreadsheet
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm currently working with the export functionality of a Smart Table, where I need to download the table data as a spreadsheet. There's a specific column called "Due Date" that receives data from the backend in the yyyymmdd format (e.g., 20240630) which I am getting in string type. For displaying this in the table, I use a formatter to convert it to dd/mm/yyyy format (e.g., 30/06/2024).

However, when exporting the data, the spreadsheet still contains the date in the yyyymmdd format. I would like to format the data to dd/mm/yyyy before exporting it to the spreadsheet.

Can anyone provide guidance on how to achieve this?

Thanks in advance!
SAPUI5

entry.title: Production order confirmation - alert on material csoting
entry.content:
Hello community, 

I have a need from specific users to have an alert from SAP when the production order is confirmed through t-codes CO11 or CO15 when the produced material is costed/valuated in its material master views. 

I know there is such an alert at production order creation level, but does it also exist at confirmation level ? 

The problem we have is that, because sometimes the production is launched too soon, before finance can cost the material. the GR from the PO is done without any cost: we need to avoid this situation. I search through the customization for production and controlling but could not find anything. 

Thank you for help. 

Yann

entry.title: API Reference for "sap.fe.macros.filter.type.Value" / "sap.fe.macros.filter.type.MultiValue"
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone let me know where to find the API Reference for API Reference for "sap.fe.macros.filter.type.Value" / "sap.fe.macros.filter.type.MultiValue".

I checked in

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/api

https://ui5.sap.com/#/api

Below is the UI5 code where I am using these. It is part code for adding custom filter in a Flexible Programming Model Fiori app. 

<MultiComboBox width="100%" selectedKeys="{path: 'filterValues>', type: 'sap.fe.macros.filter.type.MultiValue'}">
			<layoutData>
				<FlexItemData growFactor="1" />
			</layoutData>
			<items>
				<core:Item key="1" text="1" />
				<core:Item key="2" text="2" />
				<core:Item key="3" text="3" />
				<core:Item key="4" text="4" />
				<core:Item key="5" text="5" />
			</items>
		</MultiComboBox>

entry.title: How to Enable App-to-App Navigation in BAS?
entry.content:
I have 2 Fiori Applications developed in BAS with navigation and I want to test the navigation in BAS with sandbox FLP but it doesn't work.

At the beginning, the Navigation didn't work and I got the error that the navigation is not supported. I followed this blog and now I don't get the error anymore. However, the navigation still doesn't work. In debugging, I see this following coding:

var aIntents = { target: {semanticObject: "SemanticX", 
                         action: "manage"},
                params: {Par1: "X",
                         Par2: "Y"};    
                sap.ushell.Container.getServiceAsync("CrossApplicationNavigation").then( function (oCrossAppNav) {                         
                        oCrossAppNav.isNavigationSupported([aIntents]).done(function(aResponses) 
                        { 
            // do something
});
});

 

The oCrossAppNav.isNavigationSupported([aIntents]) return false back and I don't know why.

If I test the same coding in a embedded Fiori Launchpad with a Dev System -> Then the navigation works.

Do you have any ideas what I'm missing in this case?

Thanks and best regards,

TOn
